# Installation
> `npm install --save @types/roslib`

# Summary
This package contains type definitions for roslib.js (http://wiki.ros.org/roslibjs).

Files were exported from https://www.github.com/DefinitelyTyped/DefinitelyTyped/tree/master/roslib
